word: G5198 - ὑγιαίνω - hygiaínō - hoog-ee-ah'-ee-no - Be in health

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Be in health
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to be sound, to be well, to be in good health

ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G5199; to have sound health, that is, be well (in body); figuratively to be uncorrupt (true in doctrine): - be in health, (be safe and) sound, (be) whole (-some).
